//: Tells Node to treat .js files in this directory as CommonJS, regardless of the parent web/ package.json's type:module. Needed because the Emscripten-generated onionpir_client.js / harmonypir*.js wasm loaders use CommonJS module.exports = ... — we read them via require() in node tests (e.g. web/src/__tests__/onion_leakage_diff.test.ts). Vite serves the public/ tree verbatim and ignores this file at bundle time, so production is unaffected.
